eventPlan.title: AI event plan
eventPlan.description: Get a suggested plan for your event: phases, tasks, and initial recommendations. The suggestion is a starting point — nothing is applied until you accept it.
eventPlan.emptyPrompt: Generate an initial plan tailored to your event details.
eventPlan.loadingHint: This can take up to 60 seconds.
eventPlan.retryAfter: Please wait about {seconds} seconds before retrying.
eventPlan.missingData: Complete the event data (type, date, guests, budget, currency, city, language) before generating a plan.
eventPlan.hitlNotice: This suggestion is pending your review. Tasks or budget will not change until you accept it.
eventPlan.badgeAria: Content generated by AI, pending review
eventPlan.badgeFallbackAria: Base suggestion generated by the fallback provider

errors.AI_TIMEOUT: The AI took too long to respond. Please try again.
errors.AI_INVALID_OUTPUT: The AI returned an unexpected response. Please try again.
errors.AI_PROVIDER_ERROR: The AI provider is unavailable right now. Please try again shortly.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: You reached the AI usage limit. Please try again later.
errors.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: You reached the AI usage limit. Please try again later.
errors.VALIDATION: Some event data is invalid or missing.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You cannot generate a plan for this event.
errors.CONFLICT: The event is not eligible for AI planning right now.
errors.UNAUTHORIZED: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.UNKNOWN: Something went wrong while generating the plan.
errors.EVENT_LOAD_FAILED: We could not load the event details.

checklist.title: AI checklist
checklist.description: Generate a suggested checklist grouped by T-x phase for your event. Nothing is created until you confirm the selected tasks.
checklist.emptyPrompt: Generate an initial checklist tailored to your event details.
checklist.loadingHint: This can take up to 60 seconds.
checklist.retryAfter: Please wait about {seconds} seconds before retrying.
checklist.missingData: Complete the event data (type, date, language) before generating the checklist.
checklist.viewerHint: {total, plural, one {# task suggested} other {# tasks suggested}}, grouped by T-x phase.
checklist.hitlNotice: This checklist is pending your review. No tasks are created until you confirm.
checklist.noTasks: There are no applicable tasks for the days available until the event.

errors.AI_TIMEOUT: The AI took too long to respond. Please try again.
errors.AI_INVALID_OUTPUT: The AI returned an unexpected response. Please try again.
errors.AI_PROVIDER_ERROR: The AI provider is unavailable right now. Please try again shortly.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: You reached the AI usage limit. Please try again later.
errors.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: You reached the AI usage limit. Please try again later.
errors.VALIDATION: Some event data is invalid or missing.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You cannot generate a checklist for this event.
errors.CONFLICT: The event is not eligible for AI planning right now.
errors.UNAUTHORIZED: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.UNKNOWN: Something went wrong while generating the checklist.
errors.EVENT_LOAD_FAILED: We could not load the event details.

budget.title: AI budget distribution
budget.description: Get a suggested percentage distribution of your budget across canonical categories. The suggestion is a starting point — nothing is applied until you accept it.
budget.emptyPrompt: Generate an initial distribution tailored to your event details.
budget.loadingHint: This can take up to 60 seconds.
budget.retryAfter: Please wait about {seconds} seconds before retrying.
budget.missingData: Complete the event data (type, date, guests, estimated budget, currency, language) before generating a distribution.
budget.viewerHint: Distribution of {total} across {count, plural, one {# category} other {# categories}}.
budget.tableCaption: Budget distribution suggested by AI. Rows contain category, percentage, amount and notes.
budget.hitlNotice: This distribution is pending your review. Budget items are not created until you apply it in the next step.

errors.AI_TIMEOUT: The AI took too long to respond. Please try again.
errors.AI_INVALID_OUTPUT: The AI returned an unexpected response. Please try again.
errors.AI_PROVIDER_ERROR: The AI provider is unavailable right now. Please try again shortly.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: You reached the AI usage limit. Please try again later.
errors.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: You reached the AI usage limit. Please try again later.
errors.VALIDATION: Some event data is invalid or missing.
errors.INVALID_BUDGET: The estimated budget must be greater than zero to request a distribution.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You cannot generate a distribution for this event.
errors.CONFLICT: The event is not eligible for AI planning right now.
errors.UNAUTHORIZED: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.UNKNOWN: Something went wrong while generating the distribution.
errors.EVENT_LOAD_FAILED: We could not load the event details.

vendorCategories.title: AI-recommended categories
vendorCategories.description: Get a prioritized list of vendor categories to kick off your event. Suggestions only — you decide which category to explore.
vendorCategories.emptyPrompt: Generate a prioritized list based on your event data.
vendorCategories.loadingHint: It may take up to 60 seconds.
vendorCategories.missingData: Please complete the event details (type, city, language) before generating the list.
vendorCategories.viewerHint: {count, plural, one {# suggested category} other {# suggested categories}}, ordered by priority.
vendorCategories.hitlNotice: This list is informational and pending your review. No vendor is contacted or quoted until you ask for it.
vendorCategories.cardAriaLabel: {name}: {reason}. Open the vendor directory filtered by this category.

errors.AI_TIMEOUT: The AI took too long to respond. Please try again.
errors.AI_INVALID_OUTPUT: The AI returned an unexpected response. Please try again.
errors.AI_PROVIDER_ERROR: The AI provider is unavailable right now. Please try again shortly.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: You reached the AI usage limit. Please try later.
errors.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: You reached the AI usage limit. Please try later.
errors.VALIDATION: The event details are invalid or incomplete.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You cannot generate recommendations for this event.
errors.CONFLICT: The event is not eligible for AI recommendations right now.
errors.UNAUTHORIZED: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.UNKNOWN: Something went wrong while generating the recommendations.
errors.EVENT_LOAD_FAILED: We could not load the event details.

quoteBrief.title: AI quote brief
quoteBrief.description: Autocomplete the quote brief for a vendor category. Review and edit before you send the quote request.
quoteBrief.categoryHelp: Enter the active service category code the brief targets.
quoteBrief.loadingHint: This can take up to 60 seconds.
quoteBrief.missingData: Please complete the event details (type, language) before generating the brief.
quoteBrief.hitlNotice: This brief is pending your review. No quote request is created until you send it.
quoteBrief.regenerateConfirm: You have manual edits. Regenerating will replace them. Continue?

actions.sendDisabledTooltip: Final send is available with quote request creation (upcoming).

errors.AI_TIMEOUT: The AI took too long to respond. Please try again.
errors.AI_INVALID_OUTPUT: The AI returned an unexpected response. Please try again.
errors.AI_PROVIDER_ERROR: The AI provider is unavailable right now. Please try again shortly.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: You reached the AI usage limit. Please try later.
errors.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: You reached the AI usage limit. Please try later.
errors.VALIDATION: Some event data is invalid or missing.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You cannot generate the brief for this event.
errors.NOT_FOUND: The event or category was not found.
errors.CONFLICT: The event is not eligible for AI generation right now.
errors.UNAUTHORIZED: Your session expired. Please sign in again.

actions.discardConfirm: Discard this AI suggestion? This cannot be undone.

errors.applyFailed: Could not apply the suggestion. Please try again.
errors.discardFailed: Could not discard the suggestion. Please try again.
errors.notPending: This suggestion is no longer pending.
errors.payloadInvalid: The edited content does not match the required format.
errors.typeNotApplicable: This suggestion type cannot be applied yet.
errors.sideEffect: The action could not be completed. Please retry.
errors.payloadTooLarge: The edited content is too large (max 256KB).

regenerate.title: Regenerate AI suggestion
regenerate.description: Request a new version with optional feedback. Same type, language and context as the original suggestion apply.
regenerate.feedback_placeholder: E.g. I need a more casual plan, with fewer formal activities.
regenerate.feedback_hint: Feedback helps the AI adjust the suggestion. You can leave it empty.

errors.REGENERATION_LIMIT: You reached the maximum regenerations for this suggestion (5). Discard the suggestion or keep the current version.
errors.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: You reached the AI generation limit. Please try again later.
errors.AI_RATE_LIMITED: You reached the AI generation limit. Please try again later.
errors.AI_PROVIDER_ERROR: The AI provider is unavailable right now. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.AI_PROVIDER_TIMEOUT: AI took too long to respond. Please try again.
errors.AI_INVALID_OUTPUT: AI returned an unexpected response. Please try again.
errors.RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND: We couldn't find the original suggestion or it is no longer available.
errors.AI_RECOMMENDATION_NOT_FOUND: We couldn't find the original suggestion or it is no longer available.
errors.AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED: You need to sign in to regenerate the suggestion.
errors.UNEXPECTED: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

budgetApply.title: Apply AI budget suggestion
budgetApply.description: Review each item, edit amounts if needed and choose which ones to include. Nothing is saved until you press Apply.

replaceConfirm.title: Replace previous AI items?
replaceConfirm.body: This will replace {count, plural, one {# AI-generated item} other {# AI-generated items}} in {categories}. Your manual items will be preserved.
replaceConfirm.manualPreserved: Items you created manually will not be touched.

categoryInactive.title: Some categories are no longer available
categoryInactive.body: One or more categories in this suggestion have been deactivated since it was generated. You can regenerate the suggestion or apply your budget manually.

errors.CATEGORY_INACTIVE: Some categories are inactive. Regenerate the suggestion or apply manually.
errors.EVENT_NOT_EDITABLE: This event can no longer be edited (cancelled or completed).
errors.CURRENCY_MISMATCH: The suggestion currency does not match your event currency.
errors.INVALID_VALUE: The edited content is invalid. Review the amounts and try again.
errors.PAYLOAD_INVALID: The saved suggestion is not compatible. Regenerate it and retry.
errors.RECOMMENDATION_NOT_PENDING: This suggestion has already been applied or discarded.
errors.UNAUTHORIZED: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.UNKNOWN: Something went wrong applying the suggestion. Please try again.
